title: assign using posedge clock freeze simulation

features.name: combinational_assign_with_edge_sensitive_storage
features.description: Code should include an assign statement using posedge or negedge clock as a condition in a ternary operator to increment a self-referential variable, attempting to create sequential storage behavior with combinational logic

features.name: wire_counter_increment_with_posedge_condition
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration for a counter that is incremented based on posedge clock condition using ternary operator in an assign statement
